_setup_instructions.timeout_seconds: Wall-clock seconds before a probe declares the target hung. Default 5. Increase to 10+ for slow CLIs (Python imports, JVM startup).
_setup_instructions.safe_verbs: Verb names that may be invoked with bogus flags during probing. Add project-specific read-only verbs here (e.g., 'watch', 'tail', 'logs'). Must not include any verb that mutates state.
_setup_instructions.destructive_verbs: Verb names that are ONLY inspected via --help during probing - never invoked with arguments. Add project-specific destructive verbs here (e.g., 'kill', 'rollback', 'force-push', 'wipe').
_setup_instructions.rules_skill_path: Optional absolute path to a cli-for-agents skill directory for rule lookups. Leave empty to use references/rule-catalog.tsv bundled with this skill.
